creator: PFA03027@nifty.ne.jp
text:
textproc/coco port, which I provided few days ago, is broken
(see http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=33249). So I
provide textproc/coco port again. It checked on FreeBSD
4.4-RELEASE.
 This textproc/coco port originates editors/mule.

How-To-Repeat:  Uninstall editors/mule. And install this port coco.
 Then execute coco command.
 for example...
 %coco '*sjis*dos' < a.txt > b.txt
